name: Explicit native/baseline model-comparison extension
purpose: Compare DEU scoped posterior/fit context against native/baseline under matched likelihood scope.

name: Final publication-claim lock
purpose: Review all caveats, TT_lite scope, tri-anchor context, and model-comparison evidence before external claims.
next_stage_hint: Stage 3B-15 final claim lock after model-comparison extension

name: TT_lite-inclusive sensitivity sampler or fixed diagnostic
purpose: Clarify whether diagnostic TT_lite behavior changes the production posterior story.
next_stage_hint: TT_lite sensitivity branch, not a replacement for the current full-objective posterior.

name: Best-fit optimizer check at/near posterior summary
purpose: Avoid overinterpreting chain MAP-like rows as optimizer outputs.
next_stage_hint: Separate best-fit check if manuscript-style best-fit numbers are needed.

reason: Required before claiming DEU superiority over native/baseline cosmology.
minimum_output: Native/baseline posterior or evidence artifact with same likelihood scope and explicit comparison table.

reason: TT_lite was diagnostic-only in production; any TT_lite-inclusive claim needs a separate run or explicit exclusion statement.
minimum_output: Booked TT_lite scope note or sampler including TT_lite.

reason: Final external claims require a separate claim-lock after comparison scope is complete.
minimum_output: Final claim matrix with every claim mapped to evidence artifacts.
